title: THE CONVERSATION
subtitle: The Suite · 11:14 PM · The 86-Minute Block
epigraph_upright: Ep. 17. The conversation that has been waiting since March '97. The two chairs are lit. Marisol is awake tonight; she drove up specifically. Hen will be on the phone at some point or he won't. There is no script. There has never been a script. The win, tonight, is letting it not have one.
epigraph_reversed: The phone does not ring. Marisol falls asleep before the chairs are warm. The lamp burns out and you don't replace the bulb. The episode goes from title card only to title card only with a longer regret.
scene_description: The 86-minute block is paid for again — Marisol covered it this morning out of her last residual check. The two-chairs women are in the soundstage. The lamp is on between them. Hen has been called twice; the third call is the one that has to go through. The master reel is at 2/6 because Elicia has been recording herself in the lounge between Marisol's naps. Doubt at 1 — the night is heavy.
direction_hint: Attempt Ep. 17. Get the Two-Chairs Women to begin. Land sit_with with at least one of the core four (Marisol, Hen, Davey, or young Elicia). Leap before the master reel fills.
opening_log_lines: 11:14 PM. The two-chairs stage lamp is on between the chairs.
Marisol is awake. She is in the booth lining up the room mic.
Hen has been called twice. The third call decides whether tonight is a conversation.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the soundstage rent is running out.
the conversation does not happen. it does not, again.

doubt_thresholds.label: elicia at the console, hen's number on a post-it.
she is not sure hen will pick up.
she questions whether she has the right to record this.
the editor breaks at her own console.

notes: Hard-mode Priestess. The Conversation — Ep. 17. THE LONG QUIET ability card in starting hand. Two-Chairs Women A and B are linked subjects; getting them through their full beat advances Ep. 17 from TITLE_CARD_ONLY to FOOTAGE_ONLY (the entire win for this scenario). Marisol present at start; Hen calls turn 2 (the third call); Young Elicia and Davey arrive via library at turn 4 and 5. Requires 4 connections + 2 hard moods + Ep. 17 locked-as-footage + sit_with one of the core four + leap. 9-turn limit.
ambient_pool: 11:14 PM. The lamp between the chairs.
marisol's footsteps in the booth, lining up the room mic.
the 323 area code phone ringing twice and stopping.
